image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know a cluster of neurons controls your sleep by tracking daylight?
Context visual: Meet the SCN, your body's master clock, syncing with sunlight to regulate melatonin and alertness.
Escalation visual: When the sun rises, your SCN kicks in, reducing melatonin, waking you up!
Evidence visual: Studies show that disrupted light exposure can throw off your rhythm, leading to sleepless nights.
Payoff visual: Natural light is your ally. Embrace it in the morning to enhance your sleep at night.
Cta visual: Want more insights into your body's secrets? Hit that follow button!
